topic: Bulk Assignment of Transport Routes to Students
summary: This topic explains how to efficiently assign transport routes and pick-up points to multiple students simultaneously using an Excel upload, streamlining the process for large numbers of students.
steps: Download the 'Sample Excel' file provided by the system.
Fill the Excel sheet with student transport data, ensuring the following columns are populated:
- 'Vehicle Route' (the exact name of the route as defined in the system, e.g., Route 1)
- 'Pick-up Point' (the exact name of the pick-up point as defined for that route, e.g., Ansal).
Choose the completed Excel file from your system.
Click 'Submit' to upload and process the data.
business_rules: The 'Reg Number' (or Admission Number) is the unique identifier for each student in the system.
The 'Vehicle Route' and 'Pick-up Point' names in the Excel must precisely match the names configured in the ERP system.
Upon successful upload, the system automatically fetches and applies the corresponding transport fees to the students' fee demands based on the assigned route and pick-up point.
important_notes: This feature is particularly useful for bulk assignments, such as when promoting students from a previous session where transport details often remain consistent.
Users can export existing transport assignments from the 'Transport Report' section to use as a template for the bulk upload Excel.
The system will generate an error file if there are any discrepancies or missing mandatory data in the uploaded Excel sheet.
questions: How can I assign transport routes to multiple students at once?
What information is required in the Transport Excel Upload for students?
Does the transport Excel upload automatically apply the fees?
Can I use this feature for students promoted from a previous session?
What should I do if the Excel upload generates an error file?
related_topics: Defining Vehicle Routes and Pick-up Points
